welcome.title: Study Companion
welcome.subtitle: A calm companion while you practice. Snap a photo, work through a few questions — done.
welcome.signin_link: Already have an account? Sign in

age_check.title: How old are you?
age_check.subtitle: So we show the right thing for you.

hand_off_adult.title: We need a grown-up
hand_off_adult.body: Please hand the phone to a parent or other adult. They'll set up the account — and pass it back in a moment.
hand_off_adult.cta: A grown-up has the phone now

consent.title: Quick note on privacy
consent.summary: We process study data only in the EU. No ads. No data shared for training. You can export or delete anything at any time.
consent.consent_checkbox: I agree to processing of my data.

minor_consent.title: Consent for an under-16 profile
minor_consent.body: I consent to the processing of {{name}}'s data. {{name}} is under 16 years old.
minor_consent.error_already: This account already has a profile.
minor_consent.error_generic: Couldn't save right now — try again in a moment?

pin.title: Protect the account area
pin.subtitle: Choose a 4-digit PIN. The account area stays with grown-ups.
pin.confirm_subtitle: Tap the same 4 digits once more.
pin.biometric_offer: Open with Face ID / Touch ID?

hand_off_final.title: All set.
hand_off_final.subtitle: We're glad to be along for the ride.
